settings.shipping_text: Free U.S. shipping at the $150 subtotal. Standard shipping is $9.95 in the contiguous U.S. Ships within 1 to 3 business days from our Los Angeles warehouse. Orders shipped from our partner warehouses process within 1 to 4 business days.
settings.returns_text: Returns accepted for 30 days from delivery. If the toy isn't right, send it back. Free returns on damaged or defective items.
